Game.Name: Magical Quest Starring Mickey Mouse, The (USA) (Beta)
Game.plot: Overview:The Magical Quest Starring Mickey Mouse (known in Japan as Mickey's Magical Adventure) is a side-scrolling platformer developed and published by Capcom for the Super Nintendo Entertainment System on November 20, 1992 (in Japan), December 1992 (in North America), and March 18, 1993 (in Europe).A collaboration between Capcom and Disney, the game stars Disney mascot Mickey Mouse, who must use the power of magical costumes to rescue his dog Pluto from the evil Emperor Pete.The game is the first of a trilogy of platformers, collectively titled Disney's Magical Quest, and was ported to the Game Boy Advance in 2002 (titled Disney's Magical Quest Starring Mickey and Minnie Mouse). The GBA version includes a new alternate playable character (Minnie Mouse), the ability to save games, bonus mini-games (for up to two players via link cable), and bonus connectivity with the GameCube game Disney's Magical Mirror Starring Mickey Mouse.
